prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ccd554ac`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ccd554ac` end-to-end. The rule is: take the `N x N` input grid and tile it `N` times across and `N` times down to form an `N^2 x N^2` mosaic. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples, so I used it; no `notes.md` was needed. The package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ccd554ac/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ccd554ac/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ccd554ac/generator.py#L1). The generator stays on-family by sampling square `2..5` binary grids with background `0`, one nonzero foreground color, and moderate foreground occupancy, then deriving the output by the same tiling rule. No new shared primitive was added.

Validation passed cleanly: official verifier `7/7`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ccd554ac/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ccd554ac/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ccd554ac/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ccd554ac/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ccd554ac/previews/preview_03.png). No terminal image renderer was available here, so I sanity-checked the built family from sampled generated grids in `task.json` instead of directly opening the PNGs.
